action.reasoning: Observation: 24-model ensemble achieved new best AUC 0.7526. Remaining time ~3 min. Analysis: Can't train more models. Quick wins: (1) filter out weak models (val_auc < 0.73, e.g. Model 20 at 0.7239), (2) try different exponential weighting k values. This is a fast predict.py-only change. Decision: Update predict.py to filter weak models and try k=30 for sharper weighting, submit eval immediately.
